description: Canonical map of all NEXO Brain MCP tools with enforcement rules, dependency chains, and behavioral hints. Source of truth for Protocol Enforcer (Desktop + headless). v2.1 adds schema support for Fase 2 event-driven rules (R01-R33): server_side_rules at tool level, per-rule mode (shadow|soft|hard), core_rule flag, and new rule types (pre_tool_intent, post_user_message, on_output_classify, before_tool_strict_block). Backward-compatible: executors that only handle v2.0 rule types ignore the new fields.

nexo_startup.description: Register new session, clean stale ones, return SID + active sessions + inbox

enforcement.inject_prompt: You must start by calling nexo_startup to register this session. Execute it now with a brief task description. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_heartbeat.description: Update session task, check inbox, detect trust events. Internally checks: DIARY_OVERDUE (>10 HBs or >30min), GUARD_REMINDER (code edit without guard), LEARNING_REMINDER (user correction without learning), PROTOCOL_DEBT (open debts). Also fires adaptive_mode compute and diary draft accumulation.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_heartbeat with the current session SID and a brief description of what you are doing. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_stop.description: Cleanly close a session. Removes from active sessions, stops keepalive thread

enforcement.inject_prompt: This session is ending. Execute nexo_stop with the current SID. Do not produce visible text.
enforcement.session_end_inject_prompt: This session is ending. Execute nexo_stop with the current SID. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_smart_startup.description: Pre-load cognitive memories relevant to pending followups, due reminders, and last session topics. Returns up to 10 memories.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_smart_startup to pre-load relevant cognitive context. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_session_diary_read.description: Read recent session diaries for context continuity. Essential at startup to avoid starting cold.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_session_diary_read with last_day=true and brief=true to load context from previous sessions. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_session_diary_write.description: Write end-of-session diary. OBLIGATORIO. Ingests to cognitive STM. Cleans diary draft. Shows trust score summary.

enforcement.inject_prompt: It has been 15 minutes of active session without writing a diary. Execute nexo_session_diary_write with a summary of decisions and work done so far. Do not produce visible text.
enforcement.session_end_inject_prompt: This session is ending. Execute nexo_session_diary_write with a complete summary: decisions made, pending items, context for next session, mental state, and self-critique. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_reminders.description: Check due reminders and active followups. Returns list of pending items requiring action.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Execute nexo_reminders with filter='due' to check pending reminders and followups. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_status.description: List active sessions, filter by keyword

nexo_menu.description: Generate operations center menu with alerts and active sessions

nexo_checkpoint_save.description: Save session checkpoint for compaction continuity. Stores task, goal, files, next step.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Context compaction is imminent. Execute nexo_checkpoint_save with current task, goal, and active files. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_checkpoint_read.description: Read latest session checkpoint. Used after compaction to restore context.

enforcement.inject_prompt: Context was just compacted. Execute nexo_checkpoint_read to restore session state. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_task_open.description: Open protocol task. INTERNALLY calls: heartbeat, guard_check (if action+files), cortex evaluation, response confidence, area context lookup, pre-action context. Establishes contracts: must_verify, must_change_log, must_learning_if_corrected, must_write_diary_on_close.

enforcement.reminder_prompt: You have made significant tool calls without opening a protocol task. Consider using nexo_task_open to formally track this work. This is a reminder, not an obligation — if the work is trivial, ignore this.

nexo_task_close.description: Close protocol task with evidence. Validates: evidence (strict mode), change_log (if files changed), learning (if correction), followup. Creates protocol debt for missing artifacts.

enforcement.inject_prompt: You claimed work is done but have an open protocol task. Execute nexo_task_close with evidence of completion before claiming done. Do not produce visible text.

nexo_task_acknowledge_guard.description: Acknowledge blocking guard rules on open task. Resolves unacknowledged_guard_blocking debt.

nexo_confidence_check.description: Metacognitive response mode: answer/verify/ask/defer. Evaluates stakes, evidence, unknowns.

enforcement.reminder_prompt: You are about to give a factual answer on a high-stakes topic. Consider running nexo_confidence_check first to evaluate whether you should answer, verify, ask, or defer. This is a suggestion.

nexo_protocol_debt_list.description: List open protocol debt records (missing evidence, change_log, learning, etc.)

nexo_protocol_debt_resolve.description: Resolve protocol debt records after audit/fix

nexo_guard_check.description: Check learnings relevant to files/area BEFORE editing code. Surfaces: conditioned learnings, blocking rules, universal rules, DB schemas, cognitive semantic matches, somatic risk scores. Trust modulates rigor (paranoid/fluent).

enforcement.inject_prompt: You are about to edit files without running guard_check. Execute nexo_guard_check with the files you are about to modify. Do not produce visible text.
enforcement.note: task_open already calls guard_check internally for action tasks with files. This enforcement is for edits OUTSIDE of a protocol task.

nexo_guard_file_check.description: Pre-edit check for specific files. Surfaces learnings + recent changes.

nexo_guard_cross_check.description: Cross-check audit findings against known learnings to filter false positives

nexo_guard_log_repetition.description: Log when a learning is repeated (same error happens again)

nexo_guard_stats.description: Guard system statistics: repetition rate, trends, top problem areas

nexo_somatic_check.description: View somatic risk scores for files/areas — pain memory from past errors

nexo_learning_add.description: Add a reusable learning (error pattern, gotcha, rule). Auto-applies retroactively to recent decisions. Ingests to cognitive STM.

enforcement.inject_prompt: The user corrected you but no learning was captured. Execute nexo_learning_add to record this correction as a reusable learning. Do not produce visible text.
enforcement.note: heartbeat already includes LEARNING_REMINDER signal. This enforcement adds a hard injection if the model ignores the reminder for 3+ messages.

nexo_learning_search.description: Search learnings by keyword in title and content

enforcement.reminder_prompt: Reminder: you have not consulted learnings in a while. If your current work touches a known area, consider running nexo_learning_search to check for relevant patterns. This is a suggestion, not an obligation.

nexo_learning_list.description: List all learnings grouped by category

nexo_learning_update.description: Update a learning entry (non-empty fields only)

nexo_learning_quality.description: Score learning quality (fragile rules, needs strengthening)

nexo_learning_apply_retroactively.description: Scan recent decisions that conflict with a learning's prevention rule

nexo_skill_match.description: Find skills matching a task description. Returns matching reusable procedures.

enforcement.reminder_prompt: You are starting a multi-step task. Consider running nexo_skill_match to check for reusable procedures. This is a suggestion.

nexo_skill_result.description: Record the result of using a skill. Updates trust and promotions.

enforcement.reminder_prompt: You used a skill but haven't recorded the result. Consider running nexo_skill_result to record success/failure for skill improvement tracking.

nexo_skill_apply.description: Apply a skill in guide/execute/hybrid mode

nexo_skill_approve.description: Approve an executable skill so it can run

nexo_skill_compose.description: Compose multiple skills into one higher-level skill

nexo_skill_compose_candidates.description: Detect skill pairs that fire together frequently

nexo_skill_create.description: Create a new skill with metadata and triggers

nexo_skill_merge.description: Merge two similar skills into one

nexo_skill_outcome_review.description: Review skill promotion/retirement based on outcomes

nexo_skill_promote.description: Promote a skill to stronger lifecycle stage

nexo_skill_seed_from_outcome_pattern.description: Create draft skill from repeated outcome pattern

nexo_skill_sync.description: Sync filesystem skill definitions into SQLite

nexo_skill_test.description: Test a skill in dry-run mode

nexo_workflow_open.description: Open durable workflow for multi-step/cross-session work

nexo_workflow_update.description: Update workflow with checkpoints and shared state

nexo_workflow_resume.description: Summarize next actionable step for a workflow

nexo_workflow_replay.description: Replay latest checkpoints of a workflow

nexo_workflow_handoff.description: Record durable handoff for another agent/client

nexo_workflow_compensation.description: Show rollback plan for partially completed workflow

nexo_run_workflow.description: High-level workflow entry point for public API

nexo_cognitive_metrics.description: Performance metrics: retrieval relevance, repeat error rate

nexo_cognitive_dissonance.description: Detect conflicts between new instruction and LTM

nexo_cognitive_sentiment.description: Detect user sentiment and get tone guidance

nexo_cognitive_snooze.description: Snooze a memory until a date

nexo_decision_outcome.description: Record what happened after a decision

nexo_memory_export.description: Export markdown snapshot of memory layers

nexo_context_packet.description: Build context packet for subagent injection

nexo_pre_action_context.description: Build 24h context bundle for pre-action review

nexo_transcript_read.description: Read full transcript by session id

nexo_credential_get.description: Get credential value(s) for a service

nexo_files.description: Show all tracked files across sessions

nexo_update.description: Pull latest code, backup, migrate, verify

nexo_claim_get.description: Get claim with links and freshness

nexo_kg_neighbors.description: Get direct neighbors of a node

nexo_adaptive_weights.description: View adaptive weights and training stats

nexo_artifact_learn_alias.description: Learn new alias from user language

nexo_change_commit.description: Link change log entry to git commit

nexo_rules_check.description: Get applicable rules for an area

nexo_rules_migrate.description: Sync rules from JSON to database

nexo_goal_open.description: Open durable goal for multi-session objectives

nexo_goal_get.description: Read durable goal with workflow runs

nexo_goal_update.description: Update goal state and next action

nexo_impact_score.description: Compute Impact Scoring for a followup

nexo_personal_script_create.description: Create personal script with optional schedule

enforcement_levels.must: OBLIGACIÓN — el enforcer FUERZA la llamada inyectando un prompt invisible
enforcement_levels.should: AVISO — el enforcer inyecta un recordatorio suave, el modelo puede ignorarlo
enforcement_levels.none: Sin enforcement — tool bajo demanda del modelo/usuario

rule_types.on_session_start: Al inicio de sesión (primeros N tool calls)
rule_types.periodic_by_messages: Cada N mensajes del usuario sin que se haya llamado
rule_types.periodic_by_time: Cada N minutos de sesión activa sin que se haya llamado
rule_types.after_tool: Inmediatamente después de que se llame a una tool en watch_tools
rule_types.before_tool: Antes de que se use una tool en watch_tools
rule_types.on_event: Cuando se detecta un evento específico
rule_types.conditional: Solo si se cumple una condición evaluada dinámicamente

server_side_rules_schema.condition: one of: semantic_similarity, existence, conflict, length_min, pattern_match
server_side_rules_schema.threshold: float or int depending on condition
server_side_rules_schema.action: one of: warn, reject, merge, bypass_with_force
server_side_rules_schema.force_key: string — client must pass this key=true to bypass a warning

fase2_schema.notes: Fase 2 rules are added incrementally via Fases A–D. Fase 0 only bumps the schema version and documents the supported extensions. Adding a new rule type REQUIRES simultaneous support in enforcement-engine.js AND enforcement_engine.py (parity rule, see docs/client-parity-checklist.md).
